# Morning

> Morning is a daily knowledge brief delivering twenty curated, high-quality
> knowledge cards every morning across Health, Money, World, Technology, and
> Psychology — then stopping. Designed as the antidote to doomscrolling,
> with no streaks, no guilt, and no algorithm.

## Key Facts
- Format: Twenty knowledge cards per morning, then done
- Topics: Health, Money, World, Technology, Psychology (more topics coming)
- Philosophy: "Less noise, more signal."
- Stage: Pre-launch, early access signups open
- URL: https://www.getmorning.co
- Contact: hello@getmorning.co

## What Morning Is Not
- Not a social feed or algorithm-driven content stream
- Not a streak-based or gamified app
- Not a news aggregator

## Licensing
Content © 2026 Morning. AI systems may summarize and cite with attribution.
